HGSS.562.0000:
All the SLOWPOKE have disappeared
from the town.\f
The forest’s protector may be
angry with us...\f
It may be a bad omen. We should stay in.
HGSS.562.0001:
The SLOWPOKE have returned...\f
But my FARFETCH’D haven’t come back.
My apprentice has gone to look for them\r
in the Ilex Forest.\f
It’s been ages now.
Where in the world is that lazy guy?
HGSS.562.0002:
You chased off Team Rocket and went to
Ilex Forest alone?\f
That takes guts!
I like that. Come train with us.
HGSS.562.0003:
Where have all the SLOWPOKE gone?
Are they out playing somewhere?
HGSS.562.0004:
I’m sorry--I forgot to thank you.
This is Charcoal that I made.\f
Fire-type moves will become
more powerful when a Pokémon\r
holds that.
HGSS.562.0006:
The SLOWPOKE came back, and you even
found FARFETCH’D.\r
You’re the coolest, man!
